meaning: 克拉约瓦[罗马尼亚西南部城市]
examples: Unfortunately, it soon transpired that finding a decent model would mean either crossing the border into Bulgaria or travelling to Craiova, one of Romania's biggest cities.
Still eager to see more of Romania, I decided to catch a train to Craiova in order to buy a camera, and to then cycle south from there and carry on following the River Danube.
